resources.string: A hanabi show in the palm of your hand
Japanese fireworks on your Glyph Matrix

1. Open Settings → Glyph Interface → Glyph Toys
2. Enable “Glyph Hanabi”
3. Press the power button (or flip the phone face down) — the show begins the moment the screen goes dark

That’s all. There is nothing to configure, and you can close this screen now.

• Each show lasts about one minute, ending with a Niagara finale
• Waking the screen ends the show; the next screen-off starts a new one
• While charging, the matrix stays dark on purpose — hanabi belongs to the night, not the charger
• Best enjoyed in a dim room, like real fireworks
